# Stonevell — Your Digital Fortress
> Stonevell is a Reno, Nevada IT services company providing same-day computer and phone repair, cybersecurity, managed IT support, and AI automation for small businesses.

## Services
- Computer Repair: Same-day PC and Mac repair in Reno/Sparks. $50-$150 most jobs.
- Phone Repair: Screen replacement, battery, water damage.
- Virus Removal & Cybersecurity: Malware cleanup, endpoint protection, network security audits.
- Data Recovery: Hard drive, SSD, and cloud backup recovery.
- Managed IT: Ongoing IT support for small businesses. No contracts.
- AI Automation: Custom AI workflows, chatbots, and business process automation.
- Web Presence: Website design and local SEO for Reno businesses.
- Remote Support: Same-day remote troubleshooting anywhere in Nevada.

## Contact
- Phone: 775-484-3804
- Email: hello@stonevell.com
- Website: https://www.stonevell.com
- Location: Reno/Sparks, Nevada
- Service Area: Reno, Sparks, Carson City, Northern Nevada
